message:
fix(quarantine): add RecallTriggered state guard to complete_recall

complete_recall() was the only state transition method without a
prerequisite state check. Without it, complete_recall could be called
from any state (Initiated, Enforced, Lifted, etc.), bypassing the
required recall flow. Added guard + regression test. (bd-1te5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
